title: The Crew Is Scattered
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Pacifista, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But to think, you're really here~.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That old man is really something!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: that you could let them go... Kizaru?

dialogue.speaker: Pacifista
dialogue.text: Won't you stay out of my way....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: USOP, BROOK!!! GRAB ZORD AND RUN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Everyone!!! Think only of getting away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ignoring us...!! That makes me mad-.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll use all the Cola I have....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sure!! I'm praying for your safety!!
